title: Garlicky Chewy Argentinian Empanadas
description: Moist, flavorful empanadas featuring a garlic and tarragon-infused beef filling, encased in a crispy, chewy pastry.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and water in a large mixing bowl to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the beef filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the beaten eggs and sprinkle with chopped tarragon.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy!
